title: trifolium eximium
intro: Trifolium eximium, also known as the extraordinary clover or Balkan clover, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Balkan Peninsula. This perennial legume is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its high concentration of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Trifolium eximium include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
